title: An Act appropriating $1,500,000 for the operating expenses of the Waste Management Authority from the Sewer Waste Water Fund of the Treasury of the Government
text:
ACTNO.891 2
BILL NO. 35-0365
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation for the operating expenses of the Virgin Islands Waste
Management Authority from the Sewer Waste Water Fund ofthe Treasury ofthe Government
ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be itenacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The following sum, or so much thereof as may be necessary, is
appropriated from the Sewer Waste Water Fund for operating expenses including maintenance,
supplies, machinery and equipment and other purposes of the Virgin Islands Waste
Management Authority for the fiscal year October 1, 2024, to September 30, 2025.
2075 SEWER WASTE WATER FUND FY 2025
620 VI WASTE MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY
TOTAL 620 VI WASTE MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY $1,500,000
TOTAL 2075 SEWER WASTE WATER FUND $1,500,000
SECTION 2. The following sum, or so much thereof as may be necessary, is
appropriated from the Sewer Waste Water Fund of the Treasury of the Government of the
Virgin Islands in the fiscal year October 1, 2024, to September 30, 2025, for the purchase of
pumps and fittings at the Cancryn Pump Station on St. Thomas.
2075 SEWER WASTE WATER FUND FY2025
620 VI WASTE MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY
VI WASTE MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY Pump and Fittings $352,000
-
TOTAL 620 VI WASTE MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY $352,000
TOTAL 2075 SEWER WASTE WATER FUND $352,000
TOTAL 2075 SEWER WASTE WATER FUND $1,852,000

2
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 3c7fiulay of
September, AD., 2024.
r
A. A A A
Novelle E. Francis,
President
Bill No. 35-0365 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This t O9 day ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
Governor
